Barbarian: Rage: Once per combat, enter a rage for 1 minute. While raging, gain +2 melee damage, advantage on STR checks and STR saves, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
Unarmored Defense: While you aren't wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + DEX mod + CON mod. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.
Bard: Bardic Inspiration: Your Inspiration die is a d6. As a bonus action, give one creature within 60 ft. one die. Within the next hour, when that creature fails a d20 test, it can roll the die and add it to the d20. Uses equal your CHA modifier, minimum once. Regain all uses on a Long Rest.
Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 1 Bard spell. You have 2 max Mana.
Cleric: Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 1 Cleric spell. You have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Wisdom.
Divine Order: Choose one after selecting Cleric.
Druid: Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 1 Druid spell. You have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Wisdom.
Primal Order: Choose one after selecting Druid.
Fighter: Fighting Style: Gain 1 random Fighting Style feat. Defense is recommended if not rolling randomly.
Second Wind: As a bonus action, regain 1d10 HP. You can use this twice. Regain 1 use on a Short Rest and all uses on a Long Rest.
Monk: Martial Arts: Your Unarmed Strikes deal 1d6 damage. You can use DEX instead of STR for Unarmed Strike attack and damage rolls. You can make one Unarmed Strike as a bonus action.
Unarmored Defense: While you aren’t wearing armor or wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + DEX mod + WIS mod.
Paladin: Lay on Hands: You have a pool of healing power with 5 HP. As a bonus action, touch a creature, including yourself, and spend points from the pool to restore that many HP.
Spellcasting: You know Smite and 1 random Paladin spell and have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Charisma.
Ranger: Favored Enemy: You always have Hunter’s Mark prepared. You can cast it twice without spending Mana. Regain all uses on a Long Rest.
Spellcasting: You know 1 random Ranger spell and have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Wisdom.
Rogue: Expertise: Gain Expertise in two of your skill proficiencies.
Sneak Attack: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage when you hit with a Finesse or ranged weapon and have advantage, or an ally is within 5 ft. of the target.
Sorcerer: Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 1 Sorcerer spell. You have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Charisma.

Innate Sorcery: As a bonus action, unleash your magic for 1 minute. Your Sorcerer spell save DC increases by 1, and you have advantage on Sorcerer spell attack rolls. You can use this twice, regaining all uses on a Long Rest.
Warlock: Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 1 Warlock spell. You have 1 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Charisma.
Eldritch Invocations: Gain 1 random Eldritch Pact Invocation.
Wizard: Spellcasting: You know 2 cantrips and 3 Wizard spells. You have 2 max Mana. Your spellcasting ability is Intelligence.
Arcane Recovery: When you finish a Short Rest, you can study your spellbook and regain expended Mana.
